questions.question: Which article of the Indian Constitution deals with the Right to Equality?
questions.explanation: Articles 14-18 cover Right to Equality; 14 is the general clause.

questions.question: The concept of 'Basic Structure' of the Constitution was established in:
questions.explanation: Kesavananda Bharati v. State of Kerala (1973).

questions.question: Who is the ex-officio Chairman of the Rajya Sabha?
questions.explanation: Vice President chairs the Rajya Sabha.

questions.question: The Directive Principles of State Policy are borrowed from:
Money Bills can be introduced only in:
questions.explanation: Art. 110: Money Bills originate only in Lok Sabha.

questions.question: The 73rd Constitutional Amendment deals with:
questions.explanation: 1992 amendment gave constitutional status to Panchayati Raj.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a Fundamental Duty?
questions.explanation: Paying taxes is a legal obligation, not a fundamental duty (Art 51A).
